title: scanner: witness map grows unboundedly for spent notes during live session
description: wallet/src/scanner.rs:454 serializes all entries in self.witnesses back to DB on every block. Witnesses are added when notes are discovered but never removed when notes are spent (mark_note_spent updates DB but not in-memory map). Over a long session with many spends, the map grows to O(all ever-discovered notes). DB write on each block also persists witnesses for spent notes unnecessarily. On restart load_state correctly filters spent notes, but within a session the map is unbounded. Fix: remove the note's entry from self.witnesses when mark_note_spent is called.
